content: How many times does the letter "n" appear in the word "mayonnaise"?
The letter "n" appears 3 times in the word "mayonnaise".
Can you list each of them?
Sure. The 3 letters "n" that appear in the word "mayonnaise" are: nn, nn, and nn.

moves.text_span: Sure. The 3 letters "n" that appear in the word "mayonnaise" are: nn, nn, and nn...
